case_title: TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION VS. EDMUND ESPARZA et al

docket_entries.description: ORIGINAL SUMMONS FILED FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT ESPARZA, EDMUND IND AND DBA ROUTE 66 AUTO BODY SHOP RODRIGUEZ, BERTHA ESPARZA, LOURDES S
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION SERVED APR-14-2002, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ESPARZA, LOURDES S
DECLARATION ERNEST I. KNOWLES FILED RE: DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION

CAUSE CALLED, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESPARZA, EDMUND IND AND DBA ROUTE 66 AUTO BODY SHOP RODRIGUEZ, BERTHA ESPARZA, LOURDES S POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: 1 HOOOOOO QUICK SILVER 1000 DELUXE FRAME MACHINE SYSTEM, WHICH HAS A VALUE OF $5000, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $8,463.11, THE VALUE OF SAID PROPERTY, $271.44 DAMAGES, $1,175.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $194.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,640.44, TOTAL JUDGMENT IS $10103.55 (DAMAGES OF $271.44 REPRESENTS INTERESTS AWARDED). IN THE EVENT PLTF. OBTAINS POSSESSION OF AND SELLS SAID PROPERTY HEREAFTER, DEFT. SHALL RECEIVE ALL CREDITS TO WHICH THEY ARE ENTITLED BY LAW, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENTS.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PROOF OF SERVICE ON JUN-11-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
